zh.Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭貝德福爾廷格利特
zh.Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England: 英國貝德福爾廷格利特
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Bunker於大約1497年出生在英國貝德福爾廷格利特時，他的父親Roger Bunker29歲，母親Alice29歲。他於大約1522年與Ann Gosseline在英國貝德福爾廷格利特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於從1558年9月30日到1558年10月13日在英國英格蘭貝德福爾廷格利特，埋葬在英國英格蘭貝德福爾廷格利特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Bunker于大约1497年出生在英国貝德福爾廷格利特时，他的父亲Roger Bunker29岁，母亲Alice29岁。他于大约1522年与Ann Gosseline在英国貝德福爾廷格利特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于从1558年9月30日到1558年10月13日在英国英格兰貝德福爾廷格利特，埋葬在英国英格兰貝德福爾廷格利特。

nameMeanings.name: Bunker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname, of Norman origin, for a reliable or good-hearted person, from Old French bon ‘good’ + cuer ‘heart’ (from Latin cor).
History: Bunker Hill in Charlestown, MA, was named as land assigned in 1634 to George Bunker of Charlestown, who had emigrated from Odell in Bedfordshire, England.

variants.name: Banker
meanings: English: from Middle English banker, banc(o)ur, bankquer, bankert ‘covering of tapestry or other fabric for a bench, couch, or chair; ornamental hanging’, possibly a nickname or occupational name for someone who made or sold such things.
English: occupational name possibly from Middle English benker, seemingly ‘maker of benches’ but recorded only in names.
English: perhaps a variant of   Bunker  .

variants.name: Bunkers
meanings: Possibly also an altered form of English   Bunker  .
In some cases possibly also Dutch: perhaps a variant of Benkers, itself a cognate of German Benkert . The surname Bunkers is very rare in the Netherlands.

variants.name: Boenker
meanings: occupational name for a carpenter, a rounded form of   Benker  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When William Bunker was born about 1497, in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England, his father, Roger Bunker, was 29 and his mother, Alice, was 29. He married Ann Gosseline about 1522, in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died from 30 September 1558 to 13 October 1558, in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Bunker est né environ 1497, à Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Bunker, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Alice, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Ann Gosseline environ 1522, à Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé du 30 septembre 1558 au 13 octobre 1558, à Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Bunker um 1497 in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Bunker 29 und seine Mutter Alice 29. Er hat um 1522 in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England Ann Gosseline geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb von 30. September 1558 bis 13. Oktober 1558 in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Bunker è nato il circa 1497 nel Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, Roger Bunker, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Alice, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Ann Gosseline circa 1522, nel Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì da 30 settembre 1558 a 13 ottobre 1558, nel Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Bunkerが約1497年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアティングリスで生まれた時，父Roger Bunkerは29歳，母Aliceは29歳であった。約1522年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアティングリスでAnn Gosselineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼はから1558年9月30日まで1558年10月13日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアティングリスで死去し，イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアティングリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Bunker(이)가 대략 1497년 영국 베드퍼드실르 틴그리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Bunker(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1522년 영국 베드퍼드실르 틴그리스에서 Ann Gosseline(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1558년 9월 30일부터 1558년 10월 13일까지 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 틴그리스에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 틴그리스에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Ann Gosseline aproximadamente 1522, em Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Bunker родился около 1497 г. в местности тингрит, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Bunker было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Gosseline около 1522 г. в местности тингрит, бедфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер с 30 сентября 1558 по 13 октября 1558 в местности тингрит, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности тингрит, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
